notes: Royale, Playtest, [DNT], and unique-granted non-gem skills excluded.
Includes base, Vaal, and transfigured variants.
dealsDamage is true when active skill types include Damage, DamageOverTime, Attack, or CreatesMinion.
bannedSkills = optional opt-in skills (mobility, setup, or community-cited painful mains).
utilitySkills = non-damaging base skills (curses, auras, etc.).
excludedSkills = graft/item skills that are not socketable gems for a normal build.
